description_long: This rifle features a distinctive wooden thumbhole stock with two large cutouts, providing ergonomic support and a classic appearance. The main body is constructed from dark metal, with a detachable box magazine and a prominent scope mounted on top for precision aiming. The barrel is fitted with an integrally suppressed muzzle device, giving it a sleek, tactical look and reducing firing noise. A cylindrical component beneath the barrel suggests an additional suppressor or gas system. The rifle's design is reminiscent of the Dragunov SVD, blending wood and metal for both durability and style. The overall finish is a mix of matte and smooth surfaces, with visible screws and mechanical details.
description: A tactical rifle with a wooden thumbhole stock, metal body, scope, and integrally suppressed barrel, blending classic and modern elements.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the muzzle end, showing the circular suppressor and the narrow profile of the scope and barrel.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the wooden thumbhole stock, scope, detachable magazine, and integrally suppressed barrel.
description_view_2: The rifle is viewed from the stock end, emphasizing the scope alignment and the slimness of the barrel and suppressor.
description_view_3: The right side view displays the wooden stock, scope, magazine, and the full length of the integrally suppressed barrel.
